name: hexa-goal
description: /hexa-goal [<goal>] [--adapter=atlas|bench|byte-diff|smoke] [--engine mk9|mk10] [--max-rounds N] — the CONVERGENT sister of /hexa-loop. Where hexa-loop drains an active domain to DEPLETION (divergent — open-ended lens divergence), hexa-goal CLIMBS toward a verifiable GOAL PREDICATE and terminates the instant the predicate is TRUE (convergent — goal-directed best-first). The verify-adapter mechanism + every guard are reused VERBATIM from hexa-loop; only TWO things change — (a) the DISCOVER stage is GAP-ANALYSIS BEST-FIRST (compute the goal−current gap, then select the SINGLE move that shrinks the gap the most) instead of lens divergence, and (b) the TERMINATION is GOAL-MET (the goal predicate evaluates TRUE) instead of depletion. The goal predicate reuses sbs-style `assert:` contracts (grep <pat> · file <path> · verdict <slug>/<id>); the default predicate (bare invocation) = ALL of the active domain's `- [ ]` milestones are checked. Each round: (1) GAP-ANALYSIS — measure goal−current, rank candidate moves by gap-reduction, pick the best-first single move, (2) 🔌 VERIFY-ADAPTER auto-selected by active-domain kind — atlas (math) · bench (perf) · byte-diff (codegen) · smoke (web/service), (3) ABSORB the verified result into the domain SSOT — atlas embed · *.bench.md · .verdicts/<slug>/<id>.txt · ledger, (4) RE-MEASURE progress vs the goal predicate, (5) explicit disk checkpoint per round, (6) GOAL-MET test → predicate TRUE → 🏁 goal reached, terminate; max-rounds hit → 🔄 cap reached, goal NOT met; else ⏰ + ScheduleWakeup 1200s. Guards inherited VERBATIM from hexa-loop — HONEST g63 (SKIP/FALSIFIED/🟠/🟡/⚪ rejected, never absorbed), IDEMPOTENT (dedup pre-check skips an already-absorbed result), ACTIVE-DOMAIN ONLY (g58 · reads ~/.sidecar/active-domain · refuse off-domain). Adapter EXTENSION hook — drop ~/.sidecar/loop-adapter/<name>.md to add a custom adapter, identical to hexa-loop. Defaults — adapter=auto · engine=mk9 · max-rounds=25 (a goal-seeking loop carries a finite cap so a never-met predicate cannot spin forever). Triggers — '/hexa-goal', '헥사 골', '목표 루프', 'goal-directed loop', '수렴 루프', 'goal-seeking loop', '목표 도달 루프', 'climb to goal', 'converge to goal', 'gap-analysis loop'.
